market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Democrat backed by Ripple co-founder’s PAC wins Colorado primary
articles.description: Colorado’s Democratic and Republican primaries finished on Tuesday, with at least one candidate supported by $1 million from a crypto-aligned PAC going to the November general election.

articles.title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
articles.description: Research appears to reveal a bug that could render the feature effectively useless.

articles.title: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
articles.description: Bitcoin bear-market bottom signs appear as the TD9 indicator mirrors the final stages of the 2022 BTC price downtrend.

articles.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
articles.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

articles.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
articles.description: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

articles.title: Neocloud Together AI raises $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation
articles.description: The AI neocloud provider, which specializes in hosting open source models, last raised at a $3.3 billion valuation in early 2025.

articles.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain as it expands deeper into crypto
articles.description: Robinhood's product push continues to blur the line between crypto and more traditional finance.

articles.title: Lime begins life as a public company after years of uncertainty
articles.description: The nine-year-old scooter and bike-share company has said it needs the funds to help pay down around $1 billion in liabilities.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation lays out use cases for governments, institutions in new policy guide
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation said policymakers should distinguish between decentralized public blockchains and networks that remain controlled by corporations or foundations, arguing that governance structures will play a critical role in determining which platforms are suitable for long-term public sect

articles.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
articles.description: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

articles.title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
articles.description: Crypto ATM's are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.

articles.title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
articles.description: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

articles.title: Bitcoin price returns to $60K as US dollar strength rejects weekly high
articles.description: Bitcoin started July with a bang, rallying above $60,000 as traders predict a relief rally as the “base case” throughout the month.

articles.title: Ethereum backers launch nonprofit to lead institutional adoption efforts
articles.description: Backed by Joe Lubin, BitMine and SharpLink, the independent organization will serve as a liaison for financial institutions exploring Ethereum as competition for institutional capital heats up.

articles.title: Jefferies warns against buying the dip in Circle as Open USD raises new competition fears
articles.description: The investment bank said new competition from the Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium could pressure USDC's growth.

articles.title: Cantor says bitcoin bear market may be entering final stretch
articles.description: The bank said in a note bitcoin's cycle points to a market bottom in the coming months, urging investors to focus on networks with durable value accrual.

articles.title: Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400 million crypto Ponzi case
articles.description: Christopher Delgado allegedly used investor funds for a lavish lifestyle, including luxury properties and vehicles, while running a fraudulent scheme from 2023 to 2026.

articles.title: Bitcoin breaks above $60,000 after Fed Chair Warsh said inflation risks has come down
articles.description: The Fed chair reiterated the central bank's commitment to its 2% inflation target while signaling artificial intelligence could reshape the economy and monetary policy.

articles.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
articles.description: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

articles.title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
articles.description: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.
